title: ma`alah #4609
definition:
1) what comes up, thoughts
 2) step, stair
    2a) step, stair
    2b) steps (of sundial)
    2c) stories (of heaven)
    2d) ascent
    2e) song of ascent
        2e1) to the three great pilgrim feasts (Psalm titles)
